title: mieweb.jsonc
description: Portability sidecar consumed by the @mieweb CLI. wrangler.jsonc remains the source of truth for bindings; this file only records the active target and non-Cloudflare adapter hints.

wrangler.description: Path to the canonical wrangler config the CLI reads bindings from and delegates to on Cloudflare.

target.description: Default deployment target when none is given via --target or MIEWEB_TARGET.

targets.description: Per-target adapter configuration. Only consulted for non-cloudflare targets.

dim.description: Vector dimension for the sqlite-vec / libsql-vec drivers (default 768).

backend.description: AI backend for the ai driver (e.g. 'ollama').

host.description: Hostname/base URL for service-backed drivers (ai's Ollama host, valkey host).

namespace.description: Key namespace for the valkey / valkey-queue drivers.

authToken.description: Auth token for the libsql / libsql-vec drivers.

table.description: Table name for the libsql-vec driver (default vec_items).

endpoint.description: S3 endpoint URL for the s3 driver (e.g. MinIO).

region.description: S3 region for the s3 driver (default us-east-1).

bucket.description: Bucket name for the s3 driver.

accessKeyId.description: S3 access key id for the s3 driver.

secretAccessKey.description: S3 secret access key for the s3 driver.

forcePathStyle.description: Use path-style S3 addressing (required by MinIO).

models.description: Model names for the ai driver, e.g. { "embed": "nomic-embed-text" }.
